title: TODO: short title
description: The application process managed by the process supervisor has crashed. pm2.status reads crashed and no process is listening on port 4001. A start-app.sh script is provided to restart the process and restore the online status marker.
hint_1: check if anything is listening on port 4001
hint_2: look for a recovery script in the lab directory
hint_3: run it to restart the process and update the status marker
